records.m_Talk_ENG: Haaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Things are fine over here. How is everyone else doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Things are fine over here. How is everyone else doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Things are fine over here. How is everyone else doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am fine here as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am fine here as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am fine here as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A few monsters got away, but nothing the Saintess cannot handle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A few monsters got away, but nothing the Saintess cannot handle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A few monsters got away, but nothing the Saintess cannot handle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, Savior. How many have you vanquished so far?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, Savior. How many have you vanquished so far?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, Savior. How many have you vanquished so far?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am on my 12th at the moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am on my 12th at the moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am on my 12th at the moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I forgot to count again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I forgot to count again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I forgot to count again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not yap like you are the commanding officer, peasant. Do as I say, and nothing else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not yap like you are the commanding officer, peasant. Do as I say, and nothing else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not yap like you are the commanding officer, peasant. Do as I say, and nothing else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The injured are to maintain the line by switching out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The injured are to maintain the line by switching out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The injured are to maintain the line by switching out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There will be no second chance. We need to end this here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There will be no second chance. We need to end this here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There will be no second chance. We need to end this here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm all right. I can still fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm all right. I can still fight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm all right. I can still fight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're severely injured. Don't overdo yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're severely injured. Don't overdo yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're severely injured. Don't overdo yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forgive us. We're too weak, and nothing but an inconvenience to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forgive us. We're too weak, and nothing but an inconvenience to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forgive us. We're too weak, and nothing but an inconvenience to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't say that. It's my duty as the Savior to protect you all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't say that. It's my duty as the Savior to protect you all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't say that. It's my duty as the Savior to protect you all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...More people are getting injured by the minute.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...More people are getting injured by the minute.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...More people are getting injured by the minute.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are some knights in the village, but it might get dangerous if we keep losing time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are some knights in the village, but it might get dangerous if we keep losing time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are some knights in the village, but it might get dangerous if we keep losing time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope... Lucrecia is safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope... Lucrecia is safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope... Lucrecia is safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Savior! There's a problem!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Savior! There's a problem!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Savior! There's a problem!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The monsters broke through the southern routes. Our captain is down!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The monsters broke through the southern routes. Our captain is down!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The monsters broke through the southern routes. Our captain is down!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about the other routes? What happened to His Highness, or Carlota?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about the other routes? What happened to His Highness, or Carlota?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about the other routes? What happened to His Highness, or Carlota?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-well... We lost contact with them earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-well... We lost contact with them earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-well... We lost contact with them earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no way that they would've lost, but the village will be in danger if we don't do something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no way that they would've lost, but the village will be in danger if we don't do something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no way that they would've lost, but the village will be in danger if we don't do something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if I leave this place...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if I leave this place...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if I leave this place...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop them! Do whatever it takes to stop them here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop them! Do whatever it takes to stop them here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop them! Do whatever it takes to stop them here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it. There's no end to them!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it. There's no end to them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What...

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You may be strong, but you still lack decisiveness, Savior.
